content:
🔥 Hunyuan3D-2-WinPortable | Batchfile
🎯 Primary Use Case: To provide an easy-to-install and run portable application for generating 3D models and textures on Windows using the Hunyuan3D models, optimized for hardware with limited VRAM.
✨ Key Features: • Portable package for Hunyuan3D 2.0/2.1 on Windows • Optimized for consumer-grade GPUs (via mmgp integration) • Support for specific CUDA versions (12.9 and 12.6) • Reduced VRAM/RAM requirements through model offloading • Optional Developer Mode for efficient model storage
📖 Summary: This repository provides a portable package for running Hunyuan3D 2.0 and 2.1 on Windows. It integrates optimizations for consumer-grade GPUs and offers versions compatible with specific CUDA versions, simplifying the setup for 3D generation tasks.
🔗 Links: • View Project ================ 🔓 Open Source
